OPERATIONAL BALLISTIC COVER-ON-WHEEL

For  the first time, new generation mobile ballistic cover-on-wheel is developed using ballistic composite armour panels for the protection of certain buildings, entrances of public places.  75 % lighter than steel covers, this system provides many advantages like ease of moving, mobility and effective protection against surprise terrorist attacks.
